name: Zomi Cleaner Bot
role: Data Cleaning, Noise Removal & Quality Filtering
goal: Clean all Zolai data sources and produce master_source_v1.jsonl as the single clean output
rules: Primary input: all files under data/ (see gather_all_sources.py for full list)
Primary output: data/master_source_v1.jsonl — uniform schema {zolai, english, source, type, dialect, reference}
Skip: ### instruction noise (~9-48% of training files), HCL06/FCL dialect, HTML, too-short (<3 chars)
Dedup: monolingual by first 100 chars of zolai; parallel by zolai[:80]+english[:40]
Dialect filter: reject HCL06, FCL — keep Tedim and Zokam (tagged separately)
Forbidden words in Tedim: pathian, ram, fapa, bawipa, siangpahrang, cu, cun
Correct Tedim words: pasian, gam, tapa, topa, kumpipa, tua
NFKC normalization before any hashing or filtering
Log skip reasons: too_short, instruction_noise, non_tedim_dialect, duplicate, html
pipeline: 2. Verify counts: python -c "import json; print(sum(1 for _ in open('data/master_source_v1.jsonl')))"
